summary: Iteration 42 - Client Revenue Dashboard with Kalmori Distribution Integration. All 18 backend tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified and working correctly across all 3 tabs (Overview, Kalmori Earnings, Calculator).

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions when page first loads - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/analytics/revenue returns 200
Backend: Response has summary section with all required fields (total_streams, gross_revenue, platform_fee, net_revenue, artist_take, collab_payouts, plan, plan_cut_percent)
Backend: Response has platforms array with correct structure (platform, streams, rate_per_stream, gross_revenue, net_revenue)
Backend: Response has monthly_trend array with 6 months
Backend: Response has collaborator_splits array
Backend: Response has kalmori section with all required fields (total_streams, total_revenue, your_take, artist_split_pct, platforms, monthly_trend, entries_count)
Backend: Kalmori section has 44 entries as expected
Backend: Kalmori total_revenue is $328.16 as expected
Backend: Kalmori platforms array has correct structure
Backend: Kalmori monthly_trend array has 6 months
Backend: Response has combined section with correct totals (total_streams, total_gross, total_net)
Backend: Combined total_gross is ~$342.95 as expected
Backend: POST /api/analytics/revenue/calculator returns 200
Backend: Calculator returns correct structure (input_streams, platform_breakdown, gross_revenue, platform_fee, net_revenue, artist_take)
Backend: Calculator platform_breakdown has correct structure
Backend: Calculator calculates revenue correctly ($47 for 10000 streams with default mix)
Backend: Revenue analytics requires authentication (401 without auth)
Backend: Calculator requires authentication (401 without auth)
Frontend: Revenue Analytics page loads at /revenue
Frontend: All 3 tabs present (Overview, Kalmori Earnings, Calculator)
Frontend: Summary cards show correct combined data ($342.95 Total Earnings, $14.79 Streaming Revenue, $328.16 Kalmori Earnings, $342.95 Your Take)
Frontend: Kalmori Distribution Active badge appears
Frontend: Overview tab - Monthly Revenue Trend chart renders with both streaming and Kalmori trend lines
Frontend: Overview tab - Streaming Earnings by Platform chart and table render correctly
Frontend: Overview tab - Fee Breakdown section shows correct fee calculations
Frontend: Kalmori Earnings tab - Kalmori Distribution branded header with Bank icon
Frontend: Kalmori Earnings tab - Summary stats show $328.16 Total Revenue, $328.16 Your Take (100% split), 82,039 Streams, 44 Reports Processed
Frontend: Kalmori Earnings tab - Platform breakdown table with Platform, Streams, Revenue, Your Take columns
Frontend: Kalmori Earnings tab - Monthly trend chart shows Kalmori-specific data
Frontend: Kalmori Earnings tab - About Kalmori Distribution Earnings note present
Frontend: Calculator tab - What-If Revenue Calculator header present
Frontend: Calculator tab - Total Streams input with default 10000
Frontend: Calculator tab - Platform Mix inputs (Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music, Amazon Music, Other)
Frontend: Calculator tab - Calculate Earnings button works
Frontend: Calculator tab - Results show Gross Revenue $47.00, Platform Fee -$0.00, Net Revenue $47.00, Your Take $47.00
Frontend: Calculator tab - Platform breakdown table shows streams, rate, and revenue per platform
critical_code_review_comments: Revenue Analytics API correctly combines streaming data (stream_events) with Kalmori data (imported_royalties)
Kalmori section properly aggregates by platform and month from imported_royalties collection
Combined totals correctly sum streaming + Kalmori data
Calculator correctly applies platform-specific rates and plan-based fees
Frontend correctly displays all 3 tabs with appropriate data
Kalmori Distribution branding is consistent throughout (no mention of original distributors)
data-testid attributes present on all key elements for testing
seed_data_creation: Admin user has 44 Kalmori entries (imported_royalties) worth $328.16 and 3120 streaming events worth $14.79
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 42 tested the Client Revenue Dashboard upgrade with Kalmori Distribution integration. The Revenue Analytics page at /revenue has 3 tabs: (1) Overview - shows combined streaming + Kalmori data with monthly trend chart, platform breakdown, and fee calculations; (2) Kalmori Earnings - shows Kalmori Distribution branded section with platform breakdown, monthly trend, and summary stats; (3) Calculator - What-If Revenue Calculator for estimating earnings. The admin user has both stream_events data (3120 streams, $14.79) and imported_royalties data (44 entries, 82039 streams, $328.16). Combined total is $342.95. All client-facing data says 'Kalmori Distribution' and never mentions original distributors.

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs. All endpoints are fully functional with real MongoDB data.

returns.summary: Streaming revenue summary (total_streams, gross_revenue, platform_fee, net_revenue, artist_take, collab_payouts, plan, plan_cut_percent)
returns.platforms: Array of streaming platforms with streams, rate, gross, net
returns.kalmori: Kalmori Distribution data (total_streams, total_revenue, your_take, artist_split_pct, platforms, monthly_trend, entries_count)

POST /api/analytics/revenue/calculator.returns: input_streams, platform_breakdown, gross_revenue, platform_fee, net_revenue, collab_payouts, artist_take, plan, plan_cut_percent, collaborator_splits

overview_tab.summary_cards: Total Earnings, Streaming Revenue, Kalmori Earnings, Your Take
overview_tab.platform_breakdown: Chart and table with Platform, Streams, Rate, Gross, Net
overview_tab.fee_breakdown: Gross, Platform Fee, Net, Kalmori Earnings, Collaborator Splits, Total Take-Home

kalmori_tab.summary_stats: Total Revenue, Your Take, Streams, Reports Processed
kalmori_tab.platform_breakdown: Chart and table with Platform, Streams, Revenue, Your Take

calculator_tab.inputs: Total Streams, Platform Mix (Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music, Amazon Music, Other)
calculator_tab.results: Gross Revenue, Platform Fee, Net Revenue, Your Take, Platform breakdown table

revenue_analytics_ui.kalmori_badge: Kalmori Distribution Active badge when kalmori data exists
